live_branch_protection_control_plane.boundary: Live GitHub control-plane verification only; it does not replace signed artifacts, push, soak, rollback, backup/restore, or failure-injection evidence.

security_attack_surface_gate.boundary: Source/config gate only; it does not replace live penetration, signing, push, soak, rollback, backup/restore, or failure-injection evidence.

model_live_smoke_evidence.boundary: Validates a real model Q&A smoke evidence document; it does not generate or simulate a model response.

bigseller_live_smoke_evidence.boundary: Validates real BigSeller auth/order/inventory/webhook evidence from an approved BigSeller environment; it does not use the mock adapter and does not generate or simulate BigSeller responses.

main_verification_evidence.policy: Every protected main merge commit must have a successful main-verification workflow artifact whose evidence digest is bound to the merge commit and workflow run id.

main_verification_live_artifact.boundary: Live GitHub Actions artifact verification only; it proves the commit-addressed Main Verification evidence artifact exists and has not expired.

external_evidence_required.native_build: true Flutter/Rust/Tauri native build evidence with artifact references and sha256 checks
external_evidence_required.signed_artifacts: true Android/iOS/Desktop signed artifacts, including macOS notarization and platform signature verification
external_evidence_required.live_branch_protection_control_plane: live GitHub branch-protection API report matching .github/branch-protection.required.json
external_evidence_required.model_live_smoke: live model Q&A smoke proving non-empty response, trace, audit event, cost ledger, and budget enforcement
external_evidence_required.bigseller_live_smoke: true BigSeller staging smoke proving auth, order list, inventory list, webhook signature, replay guard, trace, audit, and no secret leakage
external_evidence_required.main_verification_live_artifact: successful post-merge Main Verification run with unexpired commit-addressed evidence artifact
external_evidence_required.oci_app_image_digest: release workflow must capture final registry sha256 digest
external_evidence_required.oci_sandbox_runner_digest: release environment must provide final sandbox-runner sha256 digest
external_evidence_required.macos_notarization: must be attached by native signer CI before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.windows_code_signing: must be attached by native signer CI before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.android_signed_aab: must be produced by mobile signer CI before Play distribution
external_evidence_required.ios_testflight_or_signed_ipa: must be produced by iOS signer CI before TestFlight/App Store distribution
external_evidence_required.push_delivery: true APNS/FCM push delivery evidence with provider receipt ids
external_evidence_required.apns_fcm_live_push: must be verified in staging with provider credentials
external_evidence_required.postgres_soak: true multi-instance Postgres soak with at least three gateways, two workers, sixty minutes, and zero critical failures
external_evidence_required.multi_instance_postgres_soak: must be verified with at least three gateways and multiple workers
external_evidence_required.rollback_drill: must include failed rollout and SLO recovery evidence
external_evidence_required.backup_restore_drill: must include restore timestamp, RPO, and RTO evidence
external_evidence_required.self_healing_failure_injection: must include controlled failure injection, containment action, rollback/proposal decision, and post-recovery health verification
external_evidence_required.web_admin_signed_oci_image: must be produced by release CI with digest-pinned base image and Cosign signature
external_evidence_required.desktop_native_signed_artifacts: must include platform-specific signed macOS/Windows/Linux artifacts before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.device_signature_live_rollout: must verify real desktop/mobile challenge verification and signed-request enforcement in staging

policy: Source gates may prove enforcement logic exists; distribution GA requires scripts/check_external_ga_evidence.py and scripts/check_main_verification_artifact_live.py to pass against real external signer, registry, store, staging, push, approved integration, and operations evidence.
